description: Use this API to return integer quantities of the specified fixed bus shunt. This API routine was first introduced in release 31.0.0. ierr, ival = fxsint(ibus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the shunt quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Bus IBUS substation number (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Bus IBUS bus section number (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Number of the node to which the fixed shunt is connected (returned as 0 if bus IBUS is not in a substation).
Shunt status; 1 (one) for in-service 0 (zero) for out-of-service.

error_codes.description: Bus type code is not 1, 2 or 3; ‘IVAL’ returned.
